title: Hire a permanent foreign worker - Canada.ca
content:
## Hire a permanent foreign worker
Hire foreign workers and recent graduates to fill labour or skills shortages. Support an employee in their journey to permanent residence.
Are you looking to hire a temporary worker? Learn about your hiring options .
- Sign in to the Employer Portal
- Find the right candidate with Job Match

## Services and information

## Find a skilled worker

### Hire a skilled worker or tradesperson
Hire a new worker from abroad or support an employee in getting permanent residence

### Hire a provincial nominee
How to work with a province or territory to  nominate a skilled worker

### Hire through the Atlantic Immigration Program
Become a designated employer and hire a skilled worker or international graduate

### Hire through the Rural or Francophone Community Immigration pilots
Become a designated employer in a participating community and hire a candidate

### Hire a home care worker (caregiver)
Options for employers hiring a foreign worker as a home care worker (caregiver)

## Support and resources

### Outreach services for employers
Information to help you use immigration programs to hire skilled workers

### Find out how to hire foreign workers for your business
Read the guide to find out how to hire and retain internationally trained workers for your business

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
